subject: Add sftp strict host key checking to DFC.
commit_message:
Add sftp strict host key checking to DFC.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2219

Signed-off-by: Jan Malkiewicz <jan.malkiewicz@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Iadf6c6bd743c42ebb3bf9ad8ac443fc0f3f58063

Patch Set 22:

(2 comments)

Please check that your IDE is set up to follow the formatting guides. There is a file called "onap-java-formatter.xml" that can be used for this purpose. See https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Setting+Up+Your+Development+Environment#SettingUpYourDevelopmentEnvironment-IDEs.
Please run "mvn formatter:format spotless:apply process-sources", then all files will be formatted properly.
